overall.description: Static first-person view of a medieval-style great hall or tavern interior from a video game, featuring high vaulted wooden ceilings, stone walls, long dining tables, and sparse NPCs seated at benches. Natural light streams through tall windows at the far end, illuminating the atmospheric space.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval great hall interior with high vaulted wooden ceilings and stone walls. Several NPCs are seated at long wooden tables, while natural light streams through a tall arched window at the far end. A bar area with shelving is visible along the left wall, and a blue carpet runner extends down the center of the wooden floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a medieval great hall that emphasizes the scale and lighting of the interior. It begins by capturing the high vaulted wooden ceilings and rugged stone walls that define the cavernous space. The perspective then draws attention to the long wooden tables where several NPCs are seated, while a blue carpet runner leads the eye down the center of the wooden floor. This visual path extends toward the far end of the hall, where natural light streams through a tall arched window to illuminate the room. The scene finally settles on the details of the surrounding environment, including a bar area with shelving positioned along the left wall.
